title: Front Office Manager - Ananda in the Himalayas - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Ananda in the Himalayas - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
We at Ananda in the Himalayas are looking for an experienced Front Office Manager based out of Nagpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Ananda in the Himalayas:
Ananda in the Himalayas is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ananda in the Himalayas!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
